use_cases: Displaying user profile information with a modern glassmorphic aesthetic
Team member showcase sections in landing pages
Author bio cards for blogs and content platforms
Social media profile cards for community platforms
ai_summary: A glassmorphism-styled profile card component featuring frosted glass effects with blur and transparency, displaying user information such as avatar, name, and bio. The card uses subtle gradients and backdrop blur to create depth, making it ideal for modern SaaS applications and creator platforms requiring elegant user identity presentation.
